{{Quote|Yaaaaah!|Grunda Dolma charges Asajj Ventress|<ref name="Star Wars: Clone Wars (PhotoComic)">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Cine-Manga]]</ref>}}
'''Grunda Dolma'''<ref name="USB">''[[Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''</ref> was an [[Ualaq/Legends|Ualaq]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] who fought as a [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] in a [[Mission to Rattatak|ritual battle]] in [[the Cauldron]] arena on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]<ref name="CW" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="NEC" /> The [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] attended the match, hoping to find a new [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] amongst the fighters,<ref name="CW" /> and Dolma fought using a double-headed [[Staff/Legends|staff]] for Dooku's glory.<ref name="USB" />

Prior to Dooku's arrival, Dolma fought the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]]<ref name="CW" /> [[Blorga]],<ref name="USB" /> then, after the count arrived, Dolma destroyed<ref name="CW" /> [[Mantoid]],<ref name="USB" /> a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] gladiator. After the [[Dathomirian/Legends|Dathomirian]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] entered the arena, the Aqualish and Blorga then prepared to attack the new arrival, but Ventress used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Telekinesis/Legends|throw]] the pair back. Dolma then charged Ventress alongside other gladiators, but the Dathomirian used the Force to bring chunks of rock down ontop of them, [[Death/Legends|crushing]] Dolma and the others. Ventress went on to claim victory in the arena and became Dooku's apprentice. Dolma had [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and brown skin. While in the Cauldron, the Aqualish wore a long, brown [[Robe/Legends|robe]].<ref name="CW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Grunda Dolma<ref name="USB" /> first appeared as an unnamed background character in the [[Chapter 6 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|sixth chapter]]<ref name="CW" /> of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', an animated television micro-series<ref name="Chapter Archive">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/archive.html|text=View ''Clone Wars'' Chapter Archive}}</ref> produced by [[Cartoon Network]] Studios<ref name="Volume One">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]</ref> and originally aired on [[November 14]], [[2003]].<ref name="TV">{{TVcom|url=shows/star-wars-clone-wars/chapter-vi-276612|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars - Season 1, Episode 6: Chapter VI}}</ref> The character was later named in ''[[Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', a sticker book written by [[Simon Beecroft]] and released in [[2004]].<ref name="USB" /> In [[2008]], a figure named "Aqualish Warrior" in the [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Clone Wars'']] set of [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Miniatures]]'' [[roleplaying game]] resembled Dolma, with differences in hair and [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] color.<ref name="Mini">{{SWMiniCite|set=Star Wars: The Clone Wars|pack=Aqualish Warrior}}</ref>
